features: Long-Lasting Power: The package will include a mixed pack of 6 lithium button batteries (2pcs CR2016, 2pcs CR2025, 2pcs CR2032), full 3 volts charged to make your devices run smoothly for longer.

Versatile Use: These coin cell batteries are Ideal for watches,Apple AirTags, key fobs, remote controls, computer motherboards, calculators, toys, games, MP3 players, medical devices, LED lights, fitness trackers, and much more.
Safe & Mercury-Free Button Cells – Designed with leak-proof technology and no harmful materials like mercury, making them safer for you and the environment.
Child-Safe Packaging – Comes in a secure blister pack to prevent accidental access by children while keeping the batteries fresh and protected.

If your device requires any of the following battery models, visit Directline Supplies to get the stock of many Eunicell Batteries : CR927, CR1025, CR1220, CR1216, CR1616, CR1620, CR1632, CR2016, CR2025, CR2325, CR2354, CR2430, CR2450, CR2477.
description: Mixed Eunicell 3 Volts Lithium Button Batteries The Eunicell CR Lithium Button Battery are high-performance 3V coin cell designed for long-lasting power. With a compact design and stable voltage output, they are ideal for various electronic devices, providing efficient and consistent performance. Features: Battery Type: CR2016, CR2025, CR2032 Lithium Button Cells Voltage: 3V Capacity: CR2016 (Approx. 75mAh), CR2025 (Approx. 150mAh), CR2032 (Approx.210mAh) High Performance and long-lasting power Leak-proof and high-quality construction Compatible Devices: Car key fobs Watches and clocks Calculators Remote controls Medical devices Fitness trackers LED lights Eunicell CR2016, CR2025, CR2032 batteries, ideal for long-term use in everyday electronics.
